---
title: "\'Mothers to the Front\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Mothers to the Front\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 3:10 (April 1893) 67-73

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
